    Rates 

    Mortgages Rates

    Mortgage incentives up to $1,000* available! Speak to your advisor today! We offer a 120-day rate guarantee on new mortgages and 30-day rate guarantee on renewals.

    High Ratio Mortgages
    These rates are available to members with less than a 20% down payment and requires mortgage insurance. Other conditions apply.

    Today's posted rates 

    Fixed Rate Mortgages - Closed

    Effective Date (2026-03-25)

    Posted Rates

    6-Month Fixed Closed2

    6.79%
    APR: 7.15%

    1-Year Fixed Closed2

    6.55%
    APR: 6.73%

    2-Year Fixed Closed2

    6.25%
    APR: 6.34%

    Fixed Rate Mortgages - Open

    Effective Date (2025-05-28)

    Posted Rates

    6-Month Fixed Open2,4

    8.50%
    APR: 8.86%

    1-Year Fixed Open2,4

    8.75%
    APR: 8.93%

    The rates above are for general informational purposes only and are subject to meeting Alterna’s lending guidelines.

    Promotional or special rates are discounted from the posted rate for the same term.

    Posted, special and promotional rates are subject to change or withdrawal at any time without notice and cannot be combined with any other offer or discount, unless otherwise stated in any other offer or discount.

    The Annual Percentage Rate (APR) is based on a $200,000 mortgage, 25 year amortization, for the applicable term assuming monthly payments and a property valuation fee of $350. If no fees are charged, the Annual Percentage Rate (APR) is the same as the interest rate displayed.

    For more information, and to find out more about our product terms, conditions, and application process, please visit us in branch, or call us at 1.877.560.0100.

    1. Applies to owner-occupied primary residential properties only and only to customers for a high ratio mortgage with a 25-year amortization period and less than a 20% down payment, purchasing a residential property valued at under $1,500,000. Borrower must purchase mortgage default insurance. Applicable for members switching their existing high ratio mortgage to Alterna. The switched mortgage must have an active mortgage default insurance certificate. Blends and refinances are not eligible. Renewals are not eligible for the 3-Year Fixed Closed and 5-Year Fixed Closed High Ratio rates.

    2. Fixed interest rates calculated semi-annually not in advance.

    3. Variable interest rates calculated monthly not in advance. Variable rate is discounted from the Alterna Prime Rate. Your interest rate will change whenever the Alterna Prime Rate changes.

    4. Open mortgage provides the flexibility to repay all or part of the mortgage at any time during the term without paying a penalty.

    *Mortgage incentive fees up to $1,000 for eligible borrowers to cover switching or legal fees. Does not include prepayment penalties from a member’s current Financial Institution.

    Your financial well-being comes first

    Welcome to a better way to bank. Our knowledgeable team puts your financial well-being first with good, caring and transparent advice while offering all the products and services you need.
    Stay in touch. Be the first to know about news, promotions and announcements. Sign up now!
